findings.message: Missing error handling for token refresh network request. Failed refresh requests will throw unhandled promise rejections.
findings.suggestion: Add error handling: check response.ok before calling .text(), or wrap in try-catch to handle network failures gracefully

findings.message: Token sent in request body without Content-Type header. Server may not parse the token correctly.
findings.suggestion: Add Content-Type header: { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' }, body: token } or send as JSON if server expects structured data

findings.message: Response assumed to be text without validation. Server errors or non-text responses will cause parsing issues.
findings.suggestion: Validate response before parsing: check response.ok and Content-Type header, or handle potential JSON error responses
